What is the maximum payload of the Acme R1 arm?

content.title: Acme Robotics R1 — US Customer Datasheet

messages.name: fetch_url
messages.content:
# Acme Robotics R1 — Technical Specifications

The Acme R1 is a mid-size mobile manipulation platform...

**Key specifications:**

- Dimensions: 82 cm x 54 cm x 110 cm (stowed)
- Mass: 38 kg
- Maximum payload (arm): 5 kg
- Maximum runtime on a single charge: 6 hours
- Operating temperature: 0°C to 40°C
- Connectivity: Wi-Fi 6, Ethernet, optional 5G
- SDK: Python and C++ bindings, ROS 2 Humble compatible

args.answer: The maximum payload of the Acme R1 arm is **5 kg**. According to the official technical specifications, the R1 ships with a six-degree-of-freedom arm capable of carrying up to 5 kilograms.

final_answer: The maximum payload of the Acme R1 arm is **5 kg**. According to the official technical specifications, the R1 ships with a six-degree-of-freedom arm capable of carrying up to 5 kilograms.
